response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performer as Shishigami Choco via on-screen hashtags (#霜月ちょこ生誕祭2026). 2. Identified the song title "キミの秒針" and the composer/lyricist credits (Mao and Goryo Aki of SID) from the on-screen text. 3. Searched for the lyrics to "キミの秒針" by Mao and Goryo Aki, but no official lyrics could be found online as the song is a brand-new release. 4. Provided the lyrics transcribed directly from the performance in the video.
response.global_summary: The video features a virtual YouTuber, Shishigami Choco, performing an original song titled 'キミの秒針' during a birthday event. The song is written by Mao and Aki from the band SID. The video includes an introductory talk, the live performance of the song, and a brief outro.

scenes.description: Introductory greeting and talk by Shishigami Choco.
Performance of the song 'キミの秒針' by Shishigami Choco on a stage. Credits '作詩: マオ(シド)' and '作曲: 御霊明希(シド)' are displayed.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
まだ戻れないから また愛しさがます
キミに会いたいよ
キミから受け取った 壊れそうなストーリー
どこまでも広がる 青い青い空
変わらない毎日も 色のない夢も
手放して はじめようよ
不安の夜を数え
泣きながら迎えた朝でもいい
時計の針のように 刻んだ思い出たち広がった
戻れないから また いとしさがます
キミに 会いたいよ
